channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: No CS degree? Build senior skills anyway
item.description: Go from junior to senior in 3-5 years without a CS degree — learn systems, not syllabi. Real examples from payments, caching, and Kubernetes under load.

item.title: Python 3.13 packaging: the only setup that worked
item.description: Cut Python packaging time by 73% and reduce Docker images by 28% with pyproject.toml, uv, and cibuildwheel — the stack teams use in 2026.

item.title: Stop polishing your GitHub profile
item.description: Reduce portfolio noise by 80% with one rule: publish latency graphs, cost data, and incident logs—examples from real AWS and DigitalOcean systems that landed $95k–$135k remote offers.

item.title: Claude reviews my code — here’s what works
item.description: Cut review time 70% with Claude code reviews — prompt templates, cost benchmarks, and the 3 scenarios where it still fails. Read this before you replace your human reviewers.

item.title: Event sourcing: when complexity pays off
item.description: Cut debugging time 70% with event sourcing — benchmarks, latency figures, and the storage and write-speed trade-offs teams miss. event sourcing when it helps and when it doesn’t

item.title: Burn weekends? Stop this client work trap
item.description: Cut weekend burnout 70% with this client work vs side projects split — monorepo vs micro-repo benchmarks, CI costs, and the exact decision framework to choose. Avoid the trap I fell into.

item.title: Instrument LLM pipelines like a pro
item.description: Reduce LLM pipeline latency from 1.2 s to 320 ms with 4 instrumented layers — code, prompts, vectors, downstream — and concrete Prometheus metrics you can copy today

item.title: AI didn’t move the needle? Measure this first
item.description: Cut AI tool waste: measure real velocity impact in 4 weeks with PR reopen rates, semantic validation, and cognitive load metrics — proven with concrete numbers and budgets for all tiers.

item.title: Pick PostgreSQL in 2026, here’s how to decide
item.description: Cut production decision time by 60% with a 15-minute PostgreSQL vs MySQL harness that measures ingestion latency, partial JSON indexing, replica lag, and PITR times — tested on real hardware with 1 M rows.

item.title: Python/npm supply chain attacks: 2026 attack patterns
item.description: Stop 2026 supply chain attacks: cut dependency resolution time by 70% with exact pinning, mirror hardening, and CI cache busting. Learn the real causes behind slow downloads and malicious tarballs in Python and npm.

item.title: AI code breaks here: Copilot vs Cursor in edge cases
item.description: Cut AI-generated code failures by 60% with targeted fuzzing — Copilot vs Cursor in edge cases, real benchmarks, and the tools that survive the gauntlet. Learn which AI assistant handles real-world data under load.

item.title: These 7 tools cut my solo dev time in half
item.description: spike to 95% while the app returned 502s u with These tools cut solo — spin up a Next.

item.title: 3 AI stacks that turned side projects into shipped
item.description: Ship a real product in 90 minutes with Vercel + V0 + Turso — under $0.02/day and 380ms latency under 1,000 requests — the AI stacks that turned side projects into production products

item.title: Cut AWS costs 40% without touching the code
item.description: bill grew 12% quarter-over-quarter. I spent with Cut AWS costs touching — knowing why.

item.title: Raised salary 3x in two years
item.description: Raised salary from $2,800 to $8,400 in two years by shifting from hourly coding to fixed-scope fractional CTO contracts, cutting latency from 210 ms to 48 ms, and using Neon Postgres and Fly.io to cut AWS costs 78 %. For engineers who want to price like a team, not an individual.

item.title: Run local LLMs on a laptop today
item.description: Run a 7B LLM locally on a laptop in under 3 seconds per response — VRAM limits, Q4_K_M quantization, and the flags that actually work. Benchmarks on M2 Air, RTX 3060, and RTX 3080 included.

item.title: Rewrite your backend for 5G users or lose half your
item.description: Reduce 5G backend failures by 68% with a 120-line shim, latency budgets, and jittered retries. Learn what to measure first and which dials actually move the needle.

item.title: Ace remote interviews without a CS degree
item.description: Pass remote interviews without a CS degree — real system failures, trade-offs, and the $200/month tools that actually work

item.title: Vector search: when to use it — and when not to
item.description: Cut API response time by 65% with pgvector vs Milvus — 12 ms vs 4 ms p95, $0.01 vs $0.04 per 100 k queries, and when to ignore the dedicated vector database.

item.title: GitHub Actions costs 3x CircleCI at 50k builds
item.description: At 50k builds/month GitHub Actions costs $5k–$7k while CircleCI costs $1.8k–$2.2k — concrete egress, concurrency, and secrets numbers from three Nairobi fintech systems
